signals.headline: Russia-Ukraine Easter Ceasefire (April 11-12, 2026) Collapses with Mutual Violation Claims | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Russia-Ukraine Easter Ceasefire (April 11-12, 2026) Collapses with Mutual Violation Claims | NO | HIGH confidence**

Russia announced a unilateral **Orthodox Easter ceasefire** from 4:00 PM April 11 to end of April 12, initially dismissing then reciprocating Ukraine's identical proposal, but both sides accused each other of over 2,000 violations, leading to resumed full-scale fighting by April 14.
